title: Purple Mode
description: Changes the default GUI to be purple.
body:
Purple Mode changes the default GUI to be purple while keeping the vanilla style. (along with some subtle color changes)

---



### SOURCE

This pack is ONLY on Modrinth, anywhere else is not by me.

### COMPATIBILITY

Currently, I only have Java Edition 1.20 to 1.20.1 available. I'm planning to work on older versions in the future, but for the time being those are the only 2 versions I have. 

### MOD SUPPORT


| Mod            | 1.20-1.20.1               |               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Capes           | ✅            |              |
| Doapi           | ✅            |              |
| Easy Piglins           | ✅            |              |
| Easy Anvils           | ✅            |              |
| Inventory Sorting            | ✅            |              |
| JER           | ✅            |              |
| JEI          | ✅            |              |
| Modmenu           | ✅            |              |
| Origins           | ✅            |              |
| Trash Slot            | ✅            |              |
| Vinery           | ✅            |              |
| Waystones           | ✅            |              |

#### TERMS OF USE

You CAN use this in videos and streams, credit to this pack would be greatly appreciated if you do.

Do NOT upload this to any other site and/or claim this as your own.

Do NOT take and use the textures for your own project, or anything else that reuses the textures for your own purposes.
